attributes.title: Security Threat Overview

attributes.description: This dashboard monitors overall system activity and validates that both the IoT data pipeline and the security monitoring pipeline are functioning correctly. It displays the total number of sensor records and security alerts, along with data flow trends over time, confirming successful data ingestion, processing, and indexing in Elasticsearch.
